meta.base_rule: Attributes can't be raised above 5, unless with a Discipline. Per-skill cap defaults to 5 at character creation.

attribute_max_plus_one.effect: Permanent maximum for Wits increases by 1 (e.g. 5 → 6).
Permanent maximum for Dexterity increases by 1.
Permanent maximum for Stamina increases by 1.
Permanent maximum for Manipulation increases by 1.
Permanent maximum for Strength increases by 1.
Permanent maximum for Charisma increases by 1.
Permanent maximum for Intelligence increases by 1.

skill_max.effect: On acquisition, choose either: +1 maximum on any 2 skills, or +2 maximum on 1 skill.

choices.examples: Science 5 → can later raise to 6 or 7 depending on choice.

temporary_or_situational.effect: While in Animorph animal form only: +2 to chosen Attributes (can exceed normal maximum) and skill bonuses. Does not change permanent dots/caps on sheet.
Temporary +1 to Physical Attributes per 2 HP healed; total bonus cap 5 (10 if improved by Fortitude Mastery).
Can improve Prowess From Pain: maximum temporary Physical Attribute bonus increases to 10. Not a direct cap change.
Redistribute dots among Strength/Dexterity/Stamina; maximum stays the same (typically 5 without other Discipline powers).

notes: No rulebook power permanently raises Resolve or Composure above 5.
Blood Surge dice maximum increases (e.g. to 6 or 8 via Momentum) affect roll bonuses, not attribute/skill dot caps.
Masterwork requires player choices stored on character when power is acquired.
